001// Copyright (c) Choreo contributors
002
003package choreo.auto;
004
005import choreo.Choreo.TrajectoryLogger;
006import choreo.auto.AutoFactory.AutoBindings;
007import choreo.trajectory.DifferentialSample;
008import choreo.trajectory.SwerveSample;
009import choreo.trajectory.Trajectory;
010import choreo.trajectory.TrajectorySample;
011import choreo.util.AllianceFlipUtil;
012import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
013import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation2d;
014import edu.wpi.first.math.util.Units;
015import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.DriverStation;
016import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.Timer;
017import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.event.EventLoop;
018import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
019import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.FunctionalCommand;
020import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Subsystem;
021import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
022import java.util.Optional;
023import java.util.function.BiConsumer;
024import java.util.function.BooleanSupplier;
025import java.util.function.Supplier;
026
027/**
028 * A class that represents a trajectory that can be used in an autonomous routine and have triggers
029 * based off of it.
030 */
031public class AutoTrajectory {
032  // For any devs looking through this class wondering
033  // about all the type casting and `?` for generics it's intentional.
034  // My goal was to make the sample type minimally leak into user code
035  // so you don't have to retype the sample type everywhere in your auto
036  // code. This also makes the places with generics exposed to users few
037  // and far between. This helps with more novice users
038
039  // did inches to meters like this to keep final
040  private static final double DEFAULT_TOLERANCE_METERS = Units.inchesToMeters(3);
041
042  private final String name;
043  private final Trajectory<? extends TrajectorySample<?>> trajectory;
044  private final TrajectoryLogger<? extends TrajectorySample<?>> trajectoryLogger;
045  private final Supplier<Pose2d> poseSupplier;
046  private final BiConsumer<Pose2d, ? extends TrajectorySample<?>> controller;
047  private final BooleanSupplier mirrorTrajectory;
048  private final Timer timer = new Timer();
049  private final Subsystem driveSubsystem;
050  private final EventLoop loop;
051
052  /**
053   * A way to create slightly less triggers for alot of actions. Not static as to not leak triggers
054   * made here into another static EventLoop.
055   */
056  private final Trigger offTrigger;
057
058  /** If this trajectory us currently running */
059  private boolean isActive = false;
060
061  /** The time that the previous trajectories took up */
062  private double timeOffset = 0.0;
063
064  private TrajectorySample<?> currentSample;
065
066  /**
067   * Constructs an AutoTrajectory.
068   *
069   * @param name The trajectory name.
070   * @param trajectory The trajectory samples.
071   * @param poseSupplier The pose supplier.
072   * @param controller The controller function.
073   * @param mirrorTrajectory Getter that determines whether to mirror trajectory.
074   * @param trajectoryLogger Optional trajectory logger.
075   * @param driveSubsystem Drive subsystem.
076   * @param loop Event loop.
077   * @param bindings {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
078   */
079  <SampleType extends TrajectorySample<SampleType>> AutoTrajectory(
080      String name,
081      Trajectory<SampleType> trajectory,
082      Supplier<Pose2d> poseSupplier,
083      BiConsumer<Pose2d, SampleType> controller,
084      BooleanSupplier mirrorTrajectory,
085      Optional<TrajectoryLogger<SampleType>> trajectoryLogger,
086      Subsystem driveSubsystem,
087      EventLoop loop,
088      AutoBindings bindings) {
089    this.name = name;
090    this.trajectory = trajectory;
091    this.poseSupplier = poseSupplier;
092    this.controller = controller;
093    this.mirrorTrajectory = mirrorTrajectory;
094    this.driveSubsystem = driveSubsystem;
095    this.loop = loop;
096    this.offTrigger = new Trigger(loop, () -> false);
097    this.trajectoryLogger =
098        trajectoryLogger.isPresent()
099            ? trajectoryLogger.get()
100            : new TrajectoryLogger<SampleType>() {
101              public void accept(Trajectory<SampleType> t, Boolean u) {}
102            };
103
104    bindings.getBindings().forEach((key, value) -> active().and(atTime(key)).onTrue(value));
105  }
106
107  /**
108   * Returns the time since the start of the current trajectory
109   *
110   * @return The time since the start of the current trajectory
111   */
112  private double timeIntoTrajectory() {
113    return timer.get() + timeOffset;
114  }
115
116  /**
117   * Returns the total time of all the trajectories
118   *
119   * @return The total time of all the trajectories
120   */
121  private double totalTime() {
122    return trajectory.getTotalTime();
123  }
124
125  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
126  private void logTrajectory(boolean starting) {
127    TrajectorySample<?> sample = trajectory.getInitialSample();
128    if (sample == null) {
129      return;
130    } else if (sample instanceof SwerveSample) {
131      TrajectoryLogger<SwerveSample> swerveLogger =
132          (TrajectoryLogger<SwerveSample>) trajectoryLogger;
133      Trajectory<SwerveSample> swerveTrajectory = (Trajectory<SwerveSample>) trajectory;
134      swerveLogger.accept(swerveTrajectory, starting);
135    } else if (sample instanceof DifferentialSample) {
136      TrajectoryLogger<DifferentialSample> differentialLogger =
137          (TrajectoryLogger<DifferentialSample>) trajectoryLogger;
138      Trajectory<DifferentialSample> differentialTrajectory =
139          (Trajectory<DifferentialSample>) trajectory;
140      differentialLogger.accept(differentialTrajectory, starting);
141    }
142    ;
143  }
144
145  private void cmdInitialize() {
146    timer.restart();
147    isActive = true;
148    timeOffset = 0.0;
149    logTrajectory(true);
150  }
151
152  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
153  private void cmdExecute() {
154    TrajectorySample<?> sample =
155        this.trajectory.sampleAt(timeIntoTrajectory(), mirrorTrajectory.getAsBoolean());
156
157    if (sample instanceof SwerveSample) {
158      BiConsumer<Pose2d, SwerveSample> swerveController =
159          (BiConsumer<Pose2d, SwerveSample>) this.controller;
160      SwerveSample swerveSample = (SwerveSample) sample;
161      swerveController.accept(poseSupplier.get(), swerveSample);
162    } else if (sample instanceof DifferentialSample) {
163      BiConsumer<Pose2d, DifferentialSample> differentialController =
164          (BiConsumer<Pose2d, DifferentialSample>) this.controller;
165      DifferentialSample differentialSample = (DifferentialSample) sample;
166      differentialController.accept(poseSupplier.get(), differentialSample);
167    }
168
169    currentSample = sample;
170  }
171
172  private void cmdEnd(boolean interrupted) {
173    timer.stop();
174    if (interrupted) {
175      if (currentSample instanceof SwerveSample) {
176        BiConsumer<Pose2d, SwerveSample> swerveController =
177            (BiConsumer<Pose2d, SwerveSample>) this.controller;
178        SwerveSample swerveSample = (SwerveSample) currentSample;
179        swerveController.accept(currentSample.getPose(), swerveSample);
180      } else if (currentSample instanceof DifferentialSample) {
181        BiConsumer<Pose2d, DifferentialSample> differentialController =
182            (BiConsumer<Pose2d, DifferentialSample>) this.controller;
183        DifferentialSample differentialSample = (DifferentialSample) currentSample;
184        differentialController.accept(currentSample.getPose(), differentialSample);
185      }
186    } else {
187      TrajectorySample<?> sample = this.trajectory.getFinalSample();
188
189      if (sample instanceof SwerveSample) {
190        BiConsumer<Pose2d, SwerveSample> swerveController =
191            (BiConsumer<Pose2d, SwerveSample>) this.controller;
192        SwerveSample swerveSample = (SwerveSample) sample;
193        swerveController.accept(poseSupplier.get(), swerveSample);
194      } else if (sample instanceof DifferentialSample) {
195        BiConsumer<Pose2d, DifferentialSample> differentialController =
196            (BiConsumer<Pose2d, DifferentialSample>) this.controller;
197        DifferentialSample differentialSample = (DifferentialSample) sample;
198        differentialController.accept(poseSupplier.get(), differentialSample);
199      }
200    }
201    isActive = false;
202    logTrajectory(false);
203  }
204
205  private boolean cmdIsFinished() {
206    return timeIntoTrajectory() > totalTime();
207  }
208
209  /**
210   * Creates a command that allocates the drive subsystem and follows the trajectory using the
211   * factories control function
212   *
213   * @return The command that will follow the trajectory
214   */
215  public Command cmd() {
216    // if the trajectory is empty, return a command that will print an error
217    if (trajectory.samples().isEmpty()) {
218      return driveSubsystem
219          .runOnce(
220              () -> {
221                DriverStation.reportError("Trajectory " + name + " has no samples", false);
222              })
223          .withName("Trajectory_" + name);
224    }
225    return new FunctionalCommand(
226            this::cmdInitialize,
227            this::cmdExecute,
228            this::cmdEnd,
229            this::cmdIsFinished,
230            driveSubsystem)
231        .withName("Trajectory_" + name);
232  }
233
234  /**
235   * Will get the starting pose of the trajectory.
236   *
237   * <p>This position is mirrored based on the {@code mirrorTrajectory} boolean supplier in the
238   * factory used to make this trajectory
239   *
240   * @return The starting pose
241   */
242  public Optional<Pose2d> getInitialPose() {
243    if (trajectory.samples().isEmpty()) {
244      return Optional.empty();
245    }
246    return Optional.of(trajectory.getInitialPose(mirrorTrajectory.getAsBoolean()));
247  }
248
249  /**
250   * Will get the ending pose of the trajectory.
251   *
252   * <p>This position is mirrored based on the {@code mirrorTrajectory} boolean supplier in the
253   * factory used to make this trajectory
254   *
255   * @return The starting pose
256   */
257  public Optional<Pose2d> getFinalPose() {
258    if (trajectory.samples().isEmpty()) {
259      return Optional.empty();
260    }
261    return Optional.of(trajectory.getFinalPose(mirrorTrajectory.getAsBoolean()));
262  }
263
264  /**
265   * Returns a trigger that is true while the trajectory is scheduled.
266   *
267   * @return A trigger that is true while the trajectory is scheduled.
268   */
269  public Trigger active() {
270    return new Trigger(loop, () -> this.isActive);
271  }
272
273  /**
274   * Returns a trigger that is true while the command is not scheduled.
275   *
276   * <p>The same as calling <code>active().negate()</code>.
277   *
278   * @return A trigger that is true while the command is not scheduled.
279   */
280  public Trigger inactive() {
281    return active().negate();
282  }
283
284  /**
285   * Returns a trigger that has a rising edge when the command finishes, this edge will fall again
286   * the next cycle.
287   *
288   * <p>This is not a substitute for the {@link #inactive()} trigger, inactive will stay true until
289   * the trajectory is scheduled again and will also be true if thus trajectory has never been
290   * scheduled.
291   *
292   * @return A trigger that is true when the command is finished.
293   */
294  public Trigger done() {
295    return new Trigger(
296        loop,
297        new BooleanSupplier() {
298          boolean wasJustActive = false;
299
300          public boolean getAsBoolean() {
301            if (isActive) {
302              wasJustActive = true;
303            } else if (wasJustActive) {
304              wasJustActive = false;
305              return true;
306            }
307            return false;
308          }
309        });
310  }
311
312  /**
313   * Returns a trigger that will go true for 1 cycle when the desired time has elapsed
314   *
315   * @param timeSinceStart The time since the command started in seconds.
316   * @return A trigger that is true when timeSinceStart has elapsed.
317   */
318  public Trigger atTime(double timeSinceStart) {
319    // The timer shhould never be negative so report this as a warning
320    if (timeSinceStart < 0) {
321      DriverStation.reportWarning("Trigger time cannot be negative for " + name, true);
322      return offTrigger;
323    }
324
325    // The timer should never exceed the total trajectory time so report this as a warning
326    if (timeSinceStart > totalTime()) {
327      DriverStation.reportWarning(
328          "Trigger time cannot be greater than total trajectory time for " + name, true);
329      return offTrigger;
330    }
331
332    // Make the trigger only be high for 1 cycle when the time has elapsed,
333    // this is needed for better support of multi-time triggers for multi events
334    return new Trigger(
335        loop,
336        new BooleanSupplier() {
337          double lastTimestamp = timer.get();
338
339          public boolean getAsBoolean() {
340            double nowTimestamp = timer.get();
341            try {
342              return lastTimestamp < nowTimestamp && nowTimestamp >= timeSinceStart;
343            } finally {
344              lastTimestamp = nowTimestamp;
345            }
346          }
347        });
348  }
349
350  /**
351   * Returns a trigger that is true when the event with the given name has been reached based on
352   * time.
353   *
354   * <p>A warning will be printed to the DriverStation if the event is not found and the trigger
355   * will always be false.
356   *
357   * @param eventName The name of the event.
358   * @return A trigger that is true when the event with the given name has been reached based on
359   *     time.
360   */
361  public Trigger atTime(String eventName) {
362    boolean foundEvent = false;
363    Trigger trig = offTrigger;
364
365    for (var event : trajectory.getEvents(eventName)) {
366      // This could create alot of objects, could be done a more efficient way
367      // with having it all be 1 trigger that just has a list of times and checks each one each
368      // cycle
369      // or something like that. If choreo starts proposing memory issues we can look into this.
370      trig = trig.or(atTime(event.timestamp));
371      foundEvent = true;
372    }
373
374    // The user probably expects an event to exist if they're trying to do something at that event,
375    // report the missing event.
376    if (!foundEvent) {
377      DriverStation.reportWarning("Event \"" + eventName + "\" not found for " + name, true);
378    }
379
380    return trig;
381  }
382
383  /**
384   * Returns a trigger that is true when the robot is within toleranceMeters of the given pose.
385   *
386   * <p>This position is mirrored based on the {@code mirrorTrajectory} boolean supplier in the
387   * factory used to make this trajectory.
388   *
389   * @param pose The pose to check against
390   * @param toleranceMeters The tolerance in meters.
391   * @return A trigger that is true when the robot is within toleranceMeters of the given pose.
392   */
393  public Trigger atPose(Pose2d pose, double toleranceMeters) {
394    Translation2d checkedTrans =
395        mirrorTrajectory.getAsBoolean()
396            ? AllianceFlipUtil.flip(pose.getTranslation())
397            : pose.getTranslation();
398    return new Trigger(
399        loop,
400        () -> {
401          Translation2d currentTrans = poseSupplier.get().getTranslation();
402          return currentTrans.getDistance(checkedTrans) < toleranceMeters;
403        });
404  }
405
406  /**
407   * Returns a trigger that is true when the robot is within toleranceMeters of the given events
408   * pose.
409   *
410   * <p>A warning will be printed to the DriverStation if the event is not found and the trigger
411   * will always be false.
412   *
413   * @param eventName The name of the event.
414   * @param toleranceMeters The tolerance in meters.
415   * @return A trigger that is true when the robot is within toleranceMeters of the given events
416   *     pose.
417   */
418  public Trigger atPose(String eventName, double toleranceMeters) {
419    boolean foundEvent = false;
420    Trigger trig = offTrigger;
421
422    for (var event : trajectory.getEvents(eventName)) {
423      // This could create alot of objects, could be done a more efficient way
424      // with having it all be 1 trigger that just has a list of possess and checks each one each
425      // cycle or something like that.
426      // If choreo starts proposing memory issues we can look into this.
427      Pose2d pose = trajectory.sampleAt(event.timestamp, mirrorTrajectory.getAsBoolean()).getPose();
428      trig = trig.or(atPose(pose, toleranceMeters));
429      foundEvent = true;
430    }
431
432    // The user probably expects an event to exist if they're trying to do something at that event,
433    // report the missing event.
434    if (!foundEvent) {
435      DriverStation.reportWarning("Event \"" + eventName + "\" not found for " + name, true);
436    }
437
438    return trig;
439  }
440
441  /**
442   * Returns a trigger that is true when the robot is within 3 inches of the given events pose.
443   *
444   * <p>A warning will be printed to the DriverStation if the event is not found and the trigger
445   * will always be false.
446   *
447   * @param eventName The name of the event.
448   * @return A trigger that is true when the robot is within 3 inches of the given events pose.
449   */
450  public Trigger atPose(String eventName) {
451    return atPose(eventName, DEFAULT_TOLERANCE_METERS);
452  }
453
454  /**
455   * Returns a trigger that is true when the event with the given name has been reached based on
456   * time and the robot is within toleranceMeters of the given events pose.
457   *
458   * <p>A warning will be printed to the DriverStation if the event is not found and the trigger
459   * will always be false.
460   *
461   * @param eventName The name of the event.
462   * @param toleranceMeters The tolerance in meters.
463   * @return A trigger that is true when the event with the given name has been reached based on
464   *     time and the robot is within toleranceMeters of the given events pose.
465   */
466  public Trigger atTimeAndPlace(String eventName, double toleranceMeters) {
467    return atTime(eventName).and(atPose(eventName, toleranceMeters));
468  }
469
470  /**
471   * Returns a trigger that is true when the event with the given name has been reached based on
472   * time and the robot is within 3 inches of the given events pose.
473   *
474   * <p>A warning will be printed to the DriverStation if the event is not found and the trigger
475   * will always be false.
476   *
477   * @param eventName The name of the event.
478   * @return A trigger that is true when the event with the given name has been reached based on
479   *     time and the robot is within 3 inches of the given events pose.
480   */
481  public Trigger atTimeAndPlace(String eventName) {
482    return atTimeAndPlace(eventName, DEFAULT_TOLERANCE_METERS);
483  }
484
485  /**
486   * Returns an array of all the timestamps of the events with the given name.
487   *
488   * @param eventName The name of the event.
489   * @return An array of all the timestamps of the events with the given name.
490   */
491  public double[] collectEventTimes(String eventName) {
492    return trajectory.getEvents(eventName).stream().mapToDouble(e -> e.timestamp).toArray();
493  }
494
495  /**
496   * Returns an array of all the poses of the events with the given name.
497   *
498   * @param eventName The name of the event.
499   * @return An array of all the poses of the events with the given name.
500   */
501  public Pose2d[] collectEventPoses(String eventName) {
502    var times = collectEventTimes(eventName);
503    var poses = new Pose2d[times.length];
504    for (int i = 0; i < times.length; i++) {
505      poses[i] = trajectory.sampleAt(times[i], mirrorTrajectory.getAsBoolean()).getPose();
506    }
507    return poses;
508  }
509}
